---
title: "About"
image: image.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/public-profile/settings?trk=d_flagship3_profile_self_view_public_profile
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/GabrielPalucci
comments: false
---

```{=html}

    <style>
        body {
            text-align: justify; }
    </style>
<body>
    <p><b>Hello, my name is Gabriel Palucci Rosa and <b> welcome </b> to my blog.</b> I seek to bring content about science, discussion about soil science and, mainly, reflections/stories about some fieldwork. One of the reasons for creating the blog is to maintain constant use of the R software.  </p>
</body>
```

------------------------------------------------------------

### Education

{{< fa graduation-cap >}} Degree in  <mark>Geography</mark> from the Federal University of Uberlândia

{{< fa graduation-cap >}} Master degree <mark>Geography</mark> from the Federal University of Uberlândia

{{< fa book-open >}} PhD student in <mark>Soil and Plant Nutrition</mark> by the Federal University of Viçosa
